item.title: Doctors Urged to Ask About Herbal Remedies
item.description: One in three patients uses herbal remedies with prescription medicines, prompting warnings over underreported interactions and hidden risks. Medscape ...

item.title: At Discharge, Patients’ Medication Lists Rarely Shrink
item.description: Often, drugs meant to be given temporarily are continued as patients progress through multiple departments. Medscape Medical News

item.title: The Coming Age of Genetic Doping in Olympic Sport
item.description: The rise of gene editing forces regulators to confront a difficult question: How to protect fair play in the age of genomic medicine. Medscape News Eu...

item.title: Stick a Fork in Aspirin for Cancer Prevention in Over-70s
item.description: What does extended data from the ASPREE trial reveal about daily aspirin use in this population? Medscape Medical News

item.title: The Case for Continuous Glucose Monitoring in Pregnancy
item.description: Continuous glucose monitoring improves some outcomes for mothers and infants. Medscape Medical News
